# GrabHire.ai — AI Compliance for Skip & Grab Hire
# https://grabhire.ai
# Updated: 2026-06-14
# Maintained for AI crawlers, agents, and answer-engine citations.

## About

GrabHire.ai is the trade-vertical front-door for UK skip-hire and grab-hire
operators. It surfaces relevant compliance MCPs from MEOK AI Labs (skip-hire-ai,
haulage, NRSWA, construction-iso-19650, CHAS-elite-prep).

- Operated by: MEOK AI Labs (trading name of CSOAI LTD, UK Companies House 16939677)
- Contact: hello@grabhire.ai

## Topics covered

- Operator licensing for grab-hire and skip-hire trucks
- EA waste codes + hazardous-waste consignment notes
- Waste carrier registration checks
- Tachograph and drivers' hours rules
- Fleet compliance scoring
- Site safety + LOLER plant inspection cadence

## Pricing

- Pro: £29/mo
- Enterprise: £99/mo

## Related

- Sister site: meok.ai — full MEOK MCP catalogue
- Sister sites: haulage.app, muckaway.ai, planthire.ai
- Parent: CSOAI LTD legal entity at csoai.org
- Verified: proofof.ai
